metadata.description: Oliver's personal Claude Code plugins and skills

plugins.name: ames-community-skills
plugins.description: Third-party Claude Code skills curated by Oliver Ames that ship as bare SKILL.md files with no upstream marketplace. Currently includes humanizer (blader). SwiftUI Pro installs directly from the twostraws/SwiftUI-Agent-Skill marketplace; Apple platform dev skills converted from OpenAI's Codex plugins ship as their own top-level plugins (build-ios-apps-codex, build-macos-apps-codex).

plugins.name: ames-preferred-mcps
plugins.description: Preferred third-party MCP servers curated by Oliver Ames. Includes Apple Docs, Apple Notifier, Drafts, Excel, Google Workspace, macOS Automator, MarkItDown, Pandoc, Peekaboo, XcodeBuild, iMCP, Sim Genie, and Sosumi integrations.

plugins.name: ames-standalone-skills
plugins.description: Oliver's original Claude Code skills covering writing, development, automation, finance, and AI tools (29 skills).

plugins.name: build-ios-apps-codex
plugins.description: iOS development skills converted from OpenAI's curated build-ios-apps Codex plugin (MIT). Ships 6 skills covering App Intents/Shortcuts, SwiftUI UI patterns, Liquid Glass adoption, performance auditing, view refactoring, and simulator debugging.

plugins.name: build-macos-apps-codex
plugins.description: macOS development skills and commands converted from OpenAI's curated build-macos-apps Codex plugin (MIT). Ships 11 skills plus 3 commands covering building, running, debugging, SwiftUI and AppKit patterns, signing, packaging, notarization, SwiftPM, telemetry, and window management.
